description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image. Define a single build stage with a job named build that runs the following before_script commands: apt update; apt -y install gfortran-12; update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gfortran gfortran /usr/bin/gfortran-12 999; apt -y install make autoconf automake libtool pkg-config git python3-dev; apt -y install libboost-all-dev; git clone https://gitlab.com/mdds/mdds.git /mdds; pushd /mdds; ./autogen.sh; make install; popd. In the script step the job executes ./autogen.sh --enable-werror --enable-debug-utils and then make -j $(nproc) check. The pipeline should run only for merge request events, for tag pipelines, or when the commit branch equals the default branch.
